name: Cranberry-Pumpkin-Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Combine dry ingredients separately (flour, cinnamon, baking soda, baking powder, salt).
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and pumpkin to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts, orange rind, and cranberries.
6. Pour batter evenly into two greased and floured 9x5-inch loaf pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 60 to 65 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool in pans for 10 minutes before removing from pans.
9. Frosting is optional if desired.
10. This recipe yields two loaves.
